subcodes.first_line: God willing, through His divine bounties mayest thou at all times be victorious and act in accordance with that which He hath willed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله بعنایت الهی در کل احیان فائز باشی و بما اراد عامل جمیع عالمرا باین
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @proclamation to the people of the world
